segments.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style ad video.

Timeline:
0-3s: Show a real-life wrong behavior—a hand scrubbing a greasy stovetop burner grate with a worn sponge. The grease smears but doesn't lift. Extreme close-up of the sponge dragging through thick yellow-brown residue, leaving a streaky smear. Person's hand trembles from effort, frustration visible.

3-6s: Quickly introduce the XISHUN multi-purpose kitchen degreaser spray bottle—white trigger sprayer, yellow-orange label with bold blue text and small red XISHUN badge. A hand sprays onto the greasy surface. Foam activates instantly, grease visibly begins dissolving on contact.

6-10s: Fast-cut scene showing the first clear result—the same stovetop area after one quick wipe, now gleaming clean with no residue. The product bottle is visible beside the clean area.

Do not start with a perfect product shot.
Do not end with a CTA in this segment.
Keep the pacing fast, clear, and product-focused.

Use the provided product reference images as the exact product identity.
Do not change the product color, shape, material, size ratio, logo position, texture, or visible structure.
Do not invent extra accessories, buttons, lights, packaging, or exaggerated functions.
Use the detail and side reference image to preserve product material, side structure, edge shape, texture, and visible details.
Use the function reference image only to understand the real product usage. Do not invent new functions.

Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style ad video.

Timeline:
0-4s: Fast-cut scene 2 in a different real-life usage environment—inside a greasy oven. A hand sprays the XISHUN degreaser onto baked-on dark brown grease spots on the oven back wall. Foam covers the spots. A quick wipe with a cloth reveals the clean oven wall beneath.

4-8s: Fast-cut scene 3 showing final result—the range hood filter mesh after treatment, now fully clean with no yellow oil residue. Light passes through the clean metal mesh. The XISHUN spray bottle is placed on the kitchen counter nearby, reinforcing the product identity.

8-10s: Short CTA. A clean bright kitchen scene with the XISHUN bottle centered. Text overlay: 'Make your kitchen effortlessly clean.'

This segment should feel like the continuation of the previous 10-second segment.
Keep the same product identity, visual style, pacing, and usage logic.
